key.name: refresh-short-interval-seconds
key.description: Seconds between refreshes when provider data is actively changing.

key.name: refresh-long-interval-seconds
key.description: Seconds between refreshes when provider data has been stable.

key.name: refresh-stable-reads-threshold
key.description: Number of consecutive reads with no change before degrading to the long interval.

key.name: language
key.description: Language code (e.g. 'en', 'pt_BR') or empty string to follow the system locale.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Enable verbose logging for diagnostics. Credentials are never logged regardless of this setting.

key.name: providers-order
key.description: Order in which providers appear in the status bar and panel.

key.name: codex-enabled
key.description: Whether Codex appears in the status bar and panel.

key.name: codex-display-name
key.description: Full display name for Codex in the panel and preferences.

key.name: codex-display-name-short
key.description: Compact label for Codex in the status bar.

key.name: codex-cli-path
key.description: Path to the Codex CLI binary. Empty string means auto-detect in PATH.

key.name: codex-status-fields
key.description: Fields shown for Codex in the status bar, in display order.

key.name: codex-panel-fields
key.description: Fields shown for Codex in the panel, in display order.

key.name: claude-enabled
key.description: Whether Claude appears in the status bar and panel.

key.name: claude-display-name
key.description: Full display name for Claude in the panel and preferences.

key.name: claude-display-name-short
key.description: Compact label for Claude in the status bar.

key.name: claude-cli-path
key.description: Path to the Claude CLI binary. Empty string means auto-detect in PATH.

key.name: claude-status-fields
key.description: Fields shown for Claude in the status bar, in display order.

key.name: claude-panel-fields
key.description: Fields shown for Claude in the panel, in display order.

key.name: opencode-enabled
key.description: Whether OpenCode appears in the status bar and panel.

key.name: opencode-display-name
key.description: Full display name for OpenCode in the panel and preferences.

key.name: opencode-display-name-short
key.description: Compact label for OpenCode in the status bar.

key.name: opencode-cli-path
key.description: Path to the OpenCode CLI binary. Empty string means auto-detect in PATH.

key.name: opencode-status-fields
key.description: Fields shown for OpenCode in the status bar, in display order.

key.name: opencode-panel-fields
key.description: Fields shown for OpenCode in the panel, in display order.
